name: beam-pile
description: Beam elements use elastic + section properties; piles extend beam behavior with normal/shear coupling springs and optional rockbolt features. Property keyword sets are binary-validated against FLAC2D 9.0 ('structure beam property ?' / 'structure pile property ?').

notes: 'moi' is the single in-plane moment of inertia in FLAC2D. The 'moi-y'/'moi-z'/'moi-polar' family is FLAC3D-only and rejected by FLAC2D.
'shear-coefficient' is a single scalar in FLAC2D; 'shear-coefficient-y'/'shear-coefficient-z' are FLAC3D-only.
'spacing' is the out-of-plane element spacing (FLAC2D-only concept; FLAC3D models real spacing geometrically).
'direction-y' orients the local y-axis of the beam cross section.
'plastic-moment' and 'plastic-shear' set yield thresholds when using a plastic-hinge beam model.
Coupling springs model the interaction between pile and host zones. These keywords are accepted only on piles (not beams).
Set 'rockbolt-flag true' to activate rockbolt-style coupling behavior.

FLAC3D beam/pile use the SPLIT principal-axis form (moi-y/-z, shear-coefficient-y/-z, plastic-moment-y/-z, plastic-shear-y/-z) and accept 'torsion-constant' + 'thermal-expansion'. FLAC2D uses the unified scalars (moi, shear-coefficient, plastic-moment, plastic-shear) and does NOT accept the -y/-z forms or 'thermal-expansion' or 'torsion-constant'.
'spacing' is FLAC2D-only (out-of-plane spacing); FLAC3D rejects it.
Property keyword sets verified against FLAC3D 9.0 'structure beam property ?' and FLAC2D 9.0 binary.

common_patterns.name: Elastic beam (FLAC2D)
commands: structure beam property young 2e11 poisson 0.3 cross-sectional-area 0.01 moi 1e-5 spacing 1.0

common_patterns.name: Pile with coupling (FLAC2D)
commands: structure pile property young 2e10 poisson 0.25 cross-sectional-area 0.1 moi 1e-5 perimeter 1.0 coupling-stiffness-normal 1e9 coupling-stiffness-shear 1e9 coupling-cohesion-shear 1e5

common_patterns.name: Rockbolt-style pile
commands: structure pile property rockbolt-flag true yield-tension 1e6 yield-compression 1e6 tensile-failure-strain 0.01
